title: [wip] healthcheck valid container test flakey
body:
for reasons unknow, the healthcheck valid container test is flakey. it
looks like the run of the image is exiting immediately.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:

@baude: PR needs rebase.

@baude Do we still need this or should we close?
@cevich @baude Can we close this now? tests are less flakey?

We uh, completely disabled the test.

So it's not flaking anymore!

See problem solved!

Eventually someone will wonder why the test is disabled.  Does it have a comment pointing at this issue?    (if so, then probably fine to leave this closed)
